glosses.ja: 起こす; 呼び起こす

sentences.target: Ich will dich morgen um sechs wecken.
sentences.reading: /ɪç vɪl dɪç ˈmɔʁɡən ʊm zɛks ˈvɛkən/

translations.de: Ich will dich morgen um sechs wecken.
translations.ipa: /ɪç vɪl dɪç ˈmɔʁɡən ʊm zɛks ˈvɛkən/
translations.en: I want to wake you at six tomorrow.
translations.es: Quiero despertarte mañana a las seis.
translations.fr: Je veux te réveiller demain à six heures.
translations.ko: 내일 여섯 시에 널 깨우고 싶어.
translations.ru: Я хочу разбудить тебя завтра в шесть.
translations.pt: Quero te acordar amanhã às seis.
translations.he: אני רוצה להעיר אותך מחר בשש.
translations.tr: Yarın saat altıda seni uyandırmak istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn đánh thức bạn vào sáu giờ sáng mai.
translations.ar: أريد أن أوقظك غدًا الساعة السادسة.
translations.nl: Ik wil je morgen om zes uur wakker maken.
translations.uk: Я хочу розбудити тебе завтра о шостій.
translations.hi: मैं कल छह बजे तुम्हें जगाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Chcę cię jutro obudzić o szóstej.
translations.el: Θέλω να σε ξυπνήσω αύριο στις έξι.
translations.nb: Jeg vil vekke deg i morgen klokka seks.
translations.id: Aku mau membangunkan kamu besok jam enam.
translations.sv: Jag vill väcka dig i morgon klockan sex.
translations.ro: Vreau să te trezesc mâine la ora șase.
translations.cs: Chci tě zítra vzbudit v šest.
translations.da: Jeg vil vække dig i morgen klokken seks.
translations.fi: Haluan herättää sinut huomenna kello kuudelta.
translations.ja: 明日6時にあなたを起こしたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; clause subject.
Modal auxiliary, finite present (1st sg); selects bare infinitive 'wecken'.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular accusative; direct object of 'wecken'.
Temporal adverb indicating the day of the action.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces clock-time PP.
Cardinal numeral; complement of 'um' (clock time, accusative).
Bare infinitive main verb selected by modal 'will'.

sentences.target: Der Wecker soll mich um sieben wecken.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ ˈvɛkɐ zɔl mɪç ʊm ˈziːbən ˈvɛkən/

translations.de: Der Wecker soll mich um sieben wecken.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ ˈvɛkɐ zɔl mɪç ʊm ˈziːbən ˈvɛkən/
translations.en: The alarm clock is supposed to wake me at seven.
translations.es: El despertador debe despertarme a las siete.
translations.fr: Le réveil doit me réveiller à sept heures.
translations.it: La sveglia dovrebbe svegliarmi alle sette.
translations.ko: 알람이 일곱 시에 나를 깨워줘야 돼.
translations.zh-Hans: 闹钟应该在七点把我叫醒。
translations.yue: 鬧鐘應該喺七點叫醒我。
translations.ru: Будильник должен разбудить меня в семь.
translations.pt: O despertador deve me acordar às sete.
translations.he: השעון המעורר אמור להעיר אותי בשבע.
translations.vi: Chuông báo thức phải đánh thức tôi lúc bảy giờ.
translations.ar: المنبّه من المفترض أن يوقظني الساعة السابعة.
translations.nl: De wekker moet me om zeven uur wekken.
translations.uk: Будильник має розбудити мене о сьомій.
translations.hi: अलार्म घड़ी मुझे सात बजे जगाना चाहिए.
translations.pl: Budzik ma mnie obudzić o siódmej.
translations.el: Το ξυπνητήρι πρέπει να με ξυπνήσει στις επτά.
translations.nb: Vekkerklokken skal vekke meg klokka sju.
translations.id: Alarm seharusnya membangunkan saya jam tujuh.
translations.sv: Väckarklockan ska väcka mig klockan sju.
translations.ro: Ceasul deșteptător ar trebui să mă trezească la ora șapte.
translations.cs: Budík mě má vzbudit v sedm.
translations.da: Vækkeuret skal vække mig klokken syv.
translations.ja: 目覚まし時計は7時に私を起こすはずです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Wecker'.
Noun (masc); clause subject.
Modal auxiliary, finite present (3rd sg); selects bare infinitive 'wecken'.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; direct object of 'wecken'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces clock-time PP.
Cardinal numeral; complement of 'um' (clock time, accusative).
Bare infinitive main verb selected by modal 'soll'.

translations.en: You’re not allowed to wake him.
translations.fr: Tu n'as pas le droit de le réveiller.
translations.vi: Bạn không được đánh thức anh ấy.
translations.nl: Je mag hem niet wakker maken.
translations.hi: तुम्हें उसे जगाने की अनुमति नहीं है.
translations.nb: Du har ikke lov til å vekke ham.
translations.ro: Nu ai voie să îl trezești.
translations.ja: 彼を起こしちゃだめだよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; clause subject.
Modal auxiliary, finite present (2nd sg); selects bare infinitive 'wecken'.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person masculine singular accusative; direct object of 'wecken'.
Negation particle; scopes over the VP headed by 'wecken'.
Bare infinitive main verb governed by modal 'darfst'.

translations.en: The photos bring back nice memories.
translations.fr: Les photos rappellent de beaux souvenirs.
translations.it: Le foto fanno tornare bei ricordi.
translations.zh-Hans: 照片会勾起美好的回忆。
translations.yue: 相片會勾起美好嘅回憶。
translations.vi: Những bức ảnh gợi lại những kỷ niệm đẹp.
translations.nl: De foto’s brengen mooie herinneringen terug.
translations.hu: A fotók szép emlékeket idéznek fel.
translations.hi: तस्वीरें अच्छी यादें ताज़ा कर देती हैं.
translations.ja: 写真は素敵な思い出をよみがえらせる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of 'Fotos'.
Plural noun (neuter); clause subject.
Finite main verb, present (3rd pl); agrees with 'Fotos'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Erinnerungen'; plural accusative form.
Plural noun (feminine); direct object (accusative plural) of 'wecken'.
